final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but structured visual composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, graphic-design-forward promotional aesthetic with artistic typography and layered type stacking — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered type stacking with a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring some of the typographic elements
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that overlaps the typography
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve: (1) artistic/decorative lettering treatment, (2) typographic stacking layers, (3) product/subject occluding portions of the text, (4) visually complex but organized — not chaotic
Avoid: must avoid cluttered or disorganized layouts despite high visual complexity
